name: Chat with PDF docs using AI (quoting sources)
description: Searches Google Drive for documents, uses Firecrawl to extract content from a document URL, then Claude AI answers a user question with source citations. Posts the answer to Slack using Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Chat with PDF docs using AI (quoting sources)

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for document search

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for content extraction

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the answer

question.description: Question to ask about the documents

documentUrl.description: Direct URL to a document or webpage to analyze. If not provided, Exa search is used to find relevant sources.

searchQuery.description: Search query to find documents via Exa (used when documentUrl is not provided)

steps.name: Search for relevant documents via Exa
Build Claude prompt for Q&A with citations
Build Slack Block Kit message with citations
